mapper.insert: insert into announce ( announce_title, link, author, exc_insttNm, description, lcategory, pub_date, reqst_start_date, reqst_end_date, taget_name, view_num, file_path_name, file_name, how_to_register, call_company) values ( #{announceTitle}, #{link}, #{author}, #{excInsttNm}, #{description}, #{lcategory}, #{pubDate}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{targetName}, #{viewNum}, #{filePathName}, #{fileName}, #{howToRegister}, #{callCompany} )
